hero.title: CRAFTED SAFARIS JUST FOR YOU
hero.description: SEAMLESS SAFARIS TAILORED TO MATCH YOUR DESTINATIONS.

packages.title: Safari & Beach Packages
packages.subtitle: Choose your adventure: classic safaris, family escapes, coastal relaxation and more.

about.title: Your Safari, Made Simple
about.bestGuidesDesc: Local experts who know every hidden gem and make your adventure unforgettable.
about.satisfactionDesc: We go above and beyond to ensure every guest leaves with a smile and lifelong memories.
about.uniqueDestinationsDesc: Discover one-of-a-kind safari locations and hidden gems you won't find anywhere else.
about.bestPriceDesc: Get the best value for your safari adventure with our competitive pricing and quality service.
about.flexibleDesc: Travel on your terms with flexible dates and customizable itineraries that fit your schedule.
about.sustainabilityDesc: We're committed to responsible tourism that protects wildlife and supports local communities.
about.ourStoryDesc1: From humble beginnings to leading safaris across Africa, our team is passionate about crafting journeys that celebrate wildlife, culture, and the spirit of adventure. Our mission: to make every safari personal, safe, and extraordinary for every guest.
about.ourStoryDesc2: Whether you're traveling solo, as a family, or with friends, our tailored itineraries and local expertise guarantee an experience you'll never forget.

reviews.title: Love Stories From Our Travellers
reviews.subtitle: Every journey is personal. Here's what our guests carry home.

reviews.name: Alessandro Bianchi
reviews.text: Our guide Sule took us to the most incredible spots along the Watamu coast. The beaches were breathtaking and the sunsets are something we'll talk about forever.

reviews.name: Giulia Rossi
reviews.text: Traveling solo through Amboseli, our tour guide Sule made sure I never missed a single moment. I felt completely safe and so close to the wildlife — truly life-changing.

reviews.name: Lorenzo Romano
reviews.text: Our honeymoon in the Masai Mara was beyond anything we imagined. Sule knew exactly when and where to be for every breathtaking sighting. Pure magic.

reviews.name: Chiara Conti
reviews.text: Our tour guide Sule knew all the best hidden gem spots in Watamu — we got to truly explore the Kenyan coast and then headed to Tsavo where we saw all the Big 5. Absolutely unreal.

reviews.name: Sofia Moretti
reviews.text: Our tour guide Sule was the best. We got to see so many animals up so close in the Maasai Mara — I've never felt so safe in my life. Would 100% recommend.

reviews.name: Federica De Luca
reviews.text: Sasa Safaris turned our dream of seeing the Great Migration into the most extraordinary week of our lives. Every single detail was perfect.

contact.title: ♡Book Your Safari Experience♡
contact.description: Let us know where you'd love to tour in Kenya, your budget, travel dates, number of travelers, preferred activities, or any special requests. The more details you provide, the better we can customize your safari experience!
contact.messagePlaceholder: Where in Kenya would you like to tour? What's your budget, preferred dates, number of travelers, special interests, etc.?
contact.successMessage: Our team is reviewing your message and will reach out in 10-30 minutes!

contactHours.title: 24/7 Customer Service
contactHours.description: Our team is available 24/7 to answer any queries. Contact us through the options below. Typical response time: 10–30 minutes.

comingSoon.title: Coming Soon
comingSoon.subheadline: We are bringing world-class safari experiences to Uganda, Kenya, Tanzania, and beyond. Something extraordinary is on the horizon — stay tuned.

ecoReminder.ctaAriaLabel: Contact us to learn about our conservation efforts
ecoReminder.title: We Are Guardians of This Earth
ecoReminder.lead: The ocean breathes. The savanna stretches. The forest hums with life. Every landscape we share with you holds a quiet promise — to tread gently, to see deeply, and to leave each place better than we found it.
ecoReminder.close: Travel with us, and travel with intention. The earth gives us wonder — let us give it back the respect it deserves.
ecoReminder.pledgePrompt: Before you set off - make us a promise to take care of the environment on your safari?
ecoReminder.pledgeThanks: Thank you for your pledge! We look forward to making your safari unforgettable. See you soon!!!

pledge.earth: We are committed to protecting this planet and all its ecosystems — on land, in the air, and beneath the water. Every decision we make honours that responsibility.
pledge.marine: Please never remove aquatic animals from their natural habitat — no starfish from the shallows, no fish from the reef. They belong to the water.
pledge.cleanup: We organise regular beach and trail clean-ups and welcome all who wish to join us in keeping our environments pristine.
pledge.donate: We host donation forums and partner with conservation initiatives worldwide — because protecting our natural world is everyone's cause.
pledge.footprint: We actively discourage any behaviour that may harm the natural environment, on land or in the water.
pledge.wildlife: Wild things thrive when left wild. Observe, appreciate, and leave only your wonder behind.

footer.description: Your premier destination for authentic African safari experiences. Creating memories that last a lifetime.
footer.newsletterDesc: Subscribe to get updates on new packages and offers

viewDetails.ctaText: Want to customize your journey or discuss pricing?

howWeWork.title: Safari, Crafted Around You
howWeWork.step1Desc: Tell us your dream destination, group size & budget.
howWeWork.step2Desc: Our experts build a bespoke itinerary just for you.
howWeWork.step3Desc: Review every detail and refine until it's exactly right.
howWeWork.step4Desc: Pack your bags — Africa is waiting.

mara-tsavo.title: Mara & Tsavo Wildlife Safari
mara-tsavo.description: Experience the iconic Big 5 across two legendary parks. Witness lions, elephants, and cheetahs in their natural habitat, with expert-guided game drives and evening sundowners.

amboseli-chyulu.title: Amboseli & Chyulu Explorer
amboseli-chyulu.description: Marvel at Amboseli's majestic elephants against Mount Kilimanjaro's backdrop and explore the hidden trails of Chyulu Hills for a serene wildlife adventure.

family-safari-beach.title: Family Safari & Beach Holiday
family-safari-beach.description: A perfect family mix of safari excitement and beach relaxation. Enjoy safe guided game drives, sandcastle building on Diani Beach, and fun-filled coastal activities for all ages.

romantic-safari.title: Romantic Safari & Honeymoon Escape
romantic-safari.description: Indulge in a couple's dream getaway with private safari lodges, candlelit dinners under the stars, and tranquil beachside sunsets for an unforgettable romantic experience.

coastal-adventure.title: Kenyan Coastal Adventure
coastal-adventure.description: Discover Kenya's stunning coastline with sun-soaked beaches, snorkeling adventures, and cultural explorations from Watamu to Diani. A perfect blend of adventure and relaxation.

whyChooseUs.headline: Born In Africa. Built For You.
whyChooseUs.card1Desc: Born here — trained by Africa itself.
whyChooseUs.card4Desc: We handle everything. You just show up.
whyChooseUs.humanMomentOverlay: This could be your view tomorrow.

homepageContactCTA.headline: The Wild Is Calling. Will You Answer?
homepageContactCTA.subheadline: From the Maasai Mara at dawn to Watamu's turquoise shores — your perfect African adventure is one message away.

contactPageHero.headline: Let's Plan Your Safari Together
contactPageHero.subheadline: Reach out through any channel — our team responds in 10–30 minutes.
